entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Focusing mainly on travelers and places important to the year's time period, students learn regional and world geography and practice mapwork. Additionally, students spend a term on North American regional geography and dive into political geography and the ramifications of national and regional borders, which continue into the present day.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Can easily be combined with 10-11th grade.
